calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-10-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:10am
Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Randi Rader, Respondent, appears in Pro Per; Appellant, Aquat 009 LLC, appears through counsel Cappy D. Myers. Anne S. Kihegi appears as a witness for Aquat 009 LLC. Parties, and witness are sworn.
Mr. Cappy gives opening statements for the appellant. Ms. Rader testifies in the narrative. Judge Jungreis questions the parties and the witness.
EXHR(A)A Binder of respondents exhibits
Parties give brief narrative closings
11:21am
Matter is submitted, evidence is retained

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-04-2007 Continued To May-09-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Richard Grotch; Clerk Karissa Shaw, Not reported. (525)

APPEARANCES:
Respondent Randi Rader is present.
Cappy D. Myers, Esq. appearing on behalf of Appellant Aquat 009, LLC.

This matter comes on calendar for a trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Counsel Myers requests a continuance of this matter due to his new appointment as counsel for the appellant. After discussion with counsel and the respondent, the court continues this matter to May 9, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 525.

Matter is adjourned.
